title: Beta Revived
description: A modpack which revives the nostalgic feeling of Minecraft whilst keeping features from the modern updates
body:
# A Nostalgic Version of Minecraft with Modern Aspects
This modpack transforms vanilla Minecraft to have a more nostalgic feeling whilst keeping modern features such as trial chambers and the end.
## Main Features:
- Redesigned world generation
- Old combat and hunger mechanics
- Nostalgic textures & music
- Improved performance
